files.patch:
@@ -106,2 +106,0 @@
-################################################################################
-
@@ -109,0 +107,3 @@
+  ##############################################################################
+  ## Build criuhelper
+  ##############################################################################
@@ -110,11 +111,10 @@
-    $(eval $(call SetupJdkExecutable, BUILD_CRIUHELPER, \
-        NAME := criuhelper, \
-        SRC := $(TOPDIR)/src/$(MODULE)/linux/native/libcriuengine, \
-        INCLUDE_FILES := criuhelper.c, \
-        OPTIMIZATION := HIGH, \
-        LD_SET_ORIGIN := false, \
-        OUTPUT_DIR := $(SUPPORT_OUTPUTDIR)/modules_libs/$(MODULE), \
-        STATIC_LIB := false, \
-    ))
-    TARGETS += $(BUILD_CRIUHELPER)
-
+  $(eval $(call SetupJdkExecutable, BUILD_CRIUHELPER, \
+      NAME := criuhelper, \
+      SRC := $(TOPDIR)/src/$(MODULE)/linux/native/libcriuengine, \
+      INCLUDE_FILES := criuhelper.c, \
+      OPTIMIZATION := HIGH, \
+      LD_SET_ORIGIN := false, \
+      OUTPUT_DIR := $(SUPPORT_OUTPUTDIR)/modules_libs/$(MODULE), \
+      STATIC_LIB := false, \
+  ))
+  TARGETS += $(BUILD_CRIUHELPER)
@@ -123,13 +123,6 @@
-################################################################################
-
-ifeq ($(call isTargetOs, macosx linux windows), true)
-  ifeq ($(OPENJDK_TARGET_OS), windows)
-    CRAC_ENGINE_DIR = modules_cmds
-  else
-    CRAC_ENGINE_DIR = modules_libs
-  endif
-
-  ifneq ($(USE_CRIU_CRAC),)
-
-    CRIU_CRAC_BIN := $(SUPPORT_OUTPUTDIR)/modules_libs/$(MODULE)/criu
-    TARGETS += $(CRIU_CRAC_BIN)
+ifneq ($(USE_CRIU_CRAC),)
+  ##############################################################################
+  ## Copy CRIU to lib/
+  ##############################################################################
+  CRIU_CRAC_BIN := $(SUPPORT_OUTPUTDIR)/modules_libs/$(MODULE)/criu
+  TARGETS += $(CRIU_CRAC_BIN)
@@ -141,1 +134,0 @@
-  endif
@@ -143,0 +135,2 @@
+
+################################################################################

@@ -208,1 +208,1 @@
-# Build checkpoint/restore exec library
+# Build crcommon library
@@ -213,7 +213,7 @@
-    NAME := crcommon, \
-    LINK_TYPE := C++, \
-    EXTRA_HEADER_DIRS := libjvm, \
-    CXXFLAGS := $(CXXFLAGS_JDKLIB) -DCRLIB_IS_IMPL -DCRCOMMON_IMPL, \
-    CXXFLAGS_windows := -D_WINDOWS -DWIN32, \
-    CXXFLAGS_macosx := -DMACOSX, \
-    LDFLAGS := $(LDFLAGS_JDKLIB), \
+  NAME := crcommon, \
+  LINK_TYPE := C++, \
+  EXTRA_HEADER_DIRS := libjvm, \
+  CXXFLAGS := $(CXXFLAGS_JDKLIB) -DCRLIB_IS_IMPL -DCRCOMMON_IMPL, \
+  CXXFLAGS_windows := -D_WINDOWS -DWIN32, \
+  CXXFLAGS_macosx := -DMACOSX, \
+  LDFLAGS := $(LDFLAGS_JDKLIB), \
@@ -223,0 +223,4 @@
+################################################################################
+# Build simengine library
+################################################################################
+
@@ -224,1 +228,19 @@
-    NAME := simengine, \
+  NAME := simengine, \
+  LINK_TYPE := C++, \
+  EXTRA_HEADER_DIRS := libjvm libcrcommon, \
+  CXXFLAGS := $(CXXFLAGS_JDKLIB) -DCRLIB_IS_IMPL, \
+  CXXFLAGS_windows := -D_WINDOWS -DWIN32, \
+  CXXFLAGS_macosx := -DMACOSX, \
+  LDFLAGS := $(LDFLAGS_JDKLIB), \
+  JDK_LIBS := java.base:libcrcommon, \
+))
+TARGETS += $(BUILD_LIBSIMENGINE)
+
+ifeq ($(OPENJDK_TARGET_OS), linux)
+  ################################################################################
+  # Build criuengine library
+  ################################################################################
+
+  # CFLAGS_windows from make/autoconf/flags-cflags.m4#FLAGS_SETUP_CFLAGS_HELPER
+  $(eval $(call SetupJdkLibrary, BUILD_LIBCRIUENGINE, \
+    NAME := criuengine, \
@@ -227,0 +249,1 @@
+    EXCLUDE_FILES := criuhelper.c, \
@@ -232,19 +255,2 @@
-))
-TARGETS += $(BUILD_LIBSIMENGINE)
-
-ifeq ($(OPENJDK_TARGET_OS), linux)
-
-    # CFLAGS_windows from make/autoconf/flags-cflags.m4#FLAGS_SETUP_CFLAGS_HELPER
-    $(eval $(call SetupJdkLibrary, BUILD_LIBCRIUENGINE, \
-        NAME := criuengine, \
-        LINK_TYPE := C++, \
-        EXTRA_HEADER_DIRS := libjvm libcrcommon, \
-        EXCLUDE_FILES := criuhelper.c, \
-        CXXFLAGS := $(CXXFLAGS_JDKLIB) -DCRLIB_IS_IMPL, \
-        CXXFLAGS_windows := -D_WINDOWS -DWIN32, \
-        CXXFLAGS_macosx := -DMACOSX, \
-        LDFLAGS := $(LDFLAGS_JDKLIB), \
-        JDK_LIBS := java.base:libcrcommon, \
-    ))
-    TARGETS += $(BUILD_LIBCRIUENGINE)
-
+  ))
+  TARGETS += $(BUILD_LIBCRIUENGINE)

@@ -3,1 +3,1 @@
-This is an implementation the C/R API (see `src/hotspot/share/include/crlib/`) that is used as Checkpoint/Restore Engine for CRaC. This implements the checkpoint and restore through invocation of CRIU executable.
+This is an implementation of the C/R API (see `src/hotspot/share/include/crlib/`) that is used as Checkpoint/Restore Engine for CRaC. This implements the checkpoint and restore through invocation of CRIU executable.
